scripts.build: npm run sync:shared && tsc && node dist/manifest-gen.js && node view/build.js
scripts.deploy: npm run sync:shared && tsc && node dist/manifest-gen.js && node view/build.js && mkdir -p $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-gallery-dl && cp dist/index.js dist/sites.js dist/settings.js manifest.json $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-gallery-dl/ && if [ -d dist/_shared ]; then mkdir -p $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-gallery-dl/_shared && cp -R dist/_shared/* $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-gallery-dl/_shared/; fi && mkdir -p $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-gallery-dl/view && cp view/index.js $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-gallery-dl/view/
scripts.package: npm run sync:shared && tsc && node dist/manifest-gen.js && node view/build.js && rm -rf dist/package && mkdir -p dist/package && cp dist/index.js dist/sites.js dist/settings.js manifest.json dist/package/ && if [ -d dist/_shared ]; then cp -R dist/_shared dist/package/; fi && mkdir -p dist/package/view && cp view/index.js dist/package/view/ && cd dist/package && zip -r ../plugin-gallery-dl.zip .
